description: TikTok Safari browser automation package mirroring the Instagram DM package: profile scraping, DM operations, prospect discovery, ICP scoring, CRMLite sync on port 3102

features.name: packages/tiktok-dm/ package setup: package.json (port 3102), tsconfig.json, directory structure matching instagram-dm pattern
src/drivers/safari-driver.ts: adapted from instagram-dm, connects to Safari, executeJS method, navigate method, tab management — all working on TikTok URLs
GET /health returns { status: 'ok', service: 'tiktok-dm', port: 3102 } with server running on :3102
GET /api/status returns { isOnTikTok, isLoggedIn, currentUrl } by reading Safari current tab URL
GET /api/profile/:username scrapes TikTok profile page DOM and returns { username, displayName, bio, followers, following, likes, verified, isPrivate }
GET /api/search?q=:query&type=users navigates to tiktok.com/search/user and returns array of { username, displayName, followers, verified }
GET /api/conversations navigates to tiktok.com/messages and returns array of { username, displayName, lastMessage, unread }
POST /api/messages/send-to sends TikTok DM with rate limiting (20/day, 9am-9pm, 30s minimum delay), dryRun=true returns success without sending
POST /api/prospect/discover scrapes TikTok hashtag pages, scores creators by ICP criteria (followers 1K-500K, bio keywords, engagement ratio), returns scored candidates
GET /api/prospect/score/:username ICP scores a TikTok profile (bio keywords, follower range, engagement, verified status), returns { username, score, signals, icp: { qualifies } }
CRMLite sync on DM send: POST to crmlite-isaiahduprees-projects.vercel.app/api/sync/dm with platform=tiktok, x-api-key header
tests/tiktok-dm.test.ts Layer 1: GET /health and GET /api/status pass without Safari
tests/tiktok-dm.test.ts Layer 2: GET /api/profile/charlidamelio returns followers > 1000000 (large public account)
npm run build passes with zero TypeScript errors
